title: About Us
paragraphs: This football group is created by the members of the expatriate Nepali community in Munich, Germany as a means of recreation. The objectives of this group are nothing but to play and enjoy football so that it can also provide a unique way of bringing new Nepalese arrivals and old Nepali communities together.

Come join us to stay fit and active for our general health and wellbeing in both mind and body. Any Nepalese is welcome to join no matter what your level of football skill is. We welcome everyone, from complete beginners to experts.
